articles.title: Mobiliti e-mobi.hu
articles.summary: Successful exploitation of these vulnerabilities could enable attackers to gain unauthorized administrative control over vulnerable charging stations or disrupt charging services through denial-of-service attacks. This could have significant consequences for the energy sector and the general public. The affected Mobiliti e-mobi.hu versions could be exploited by attackers to gain critical control over charging infrastructure.
